subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Lord of Names unto them that have hearkened unto the Call and responded to their Ancient Lord, that it may become the Call of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الاسماء لمن سمع الندآء و اجاب مولیه القدیم لیجعله ندآء الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
